title: aira major subsp. alpina
intro: Aira major subsp. alpina, also known as mountain hair grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Aira grasses. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The medicinal properties of Aira major subsp. alpina include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, while its health benefits include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Aira major subsp. alpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
